Package org.apache.gravitino.dto.rel

Class ViewDTO.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.gravitino.dto.rel.ViewDTO.Builder
Enclosing class:
ViewDTO
public static class ViewDTO.Builder extends Object
Builder class for constructing ViewDTO instances.
